channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gaza: Recovering bodies from rubble after deadly strike
item.description: A year and a half later, survivors are still dealing with the aftermath of an Israeli strike that devastated one family.

item.title: Medicare to Offer New Weight Loss Drug Option
item.description: Medicare recipients will soon have access to discounted GLP-1 drugs for weight management. Details on the program are outlined.

item.title: Origins of 'wash' vs. 'warsh' pronunciation
item.description: Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair, has prompted discussion regarding the pronunciation of his name.

item.title: Lindsey Vonn's Olympic crash: A look at her resilience
item.description: Vonn competed in the Olympics despite a torn ACL, but suffered a broken leg. She has consistently overcome challenges throughout her career.
